description: Address review issues: fix version history encryption key, duplicate detection on ciphertext, folder move cascading, quota enforcement at upload, share ownership verification, folder delete with files check, folder rename implementation, and search indexing hook.
steps: Fix version history loses encryption key - store encryptionKey in fileVersion record
Fix duplicate detection on ciphertext - store contentHash at upload and compare hashes
Fix folder move cascade - update descendant paths recursively
Fix quota enforcement - wire StorageQuotaService into upload route
Fix share ownership - verify file/folder ownership before sharing
Fix folder delete with files - check for contained files
Fix folder rename - implement name update in PUT route
Fix search indexing hook - call AISearchContentService.indexFile after upload
Update tests to cover new behavior
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate detection uses contentHash stored at upload time
Folder move cascades path updates to descendants
PUT folder route handles name-only updates
verification: Run `NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run` from apps/quantdrive directory
findings: All 89 tests pass (7 new tests added for ownership verification, file check on folder delete, folder rename, cascade path updates, contentHash in uploads, and encryptionKey in versions). TypeScript compiles cleanly. Prettier formatted all files via lint-staged on commit.
